message:
feat(cli): comprehensive CLI parsing tests + config/app improvements

Add ~440 lines of CLI unit tests covering every major flag path:
- Basic flags: -c/--continue, -r/--resume, -p/--print, -v/--version,
  --verbose, --model, --provider, --api-key, --session, --session-dir,
  --no-session, --system-prompt, --append-system-prompt, --export
- Thinking level parsing: all 6 valid levels + rejection of invalid
- @file expansion: split behavior, empty cases, prefix stripping
- Subcommand parsing: install, install --local, config, doctor, theme
- Edge cases: empty args, multiple @files, conflicting flags,
  unknown subcommands

app.rs improvements:
- Add test_model_entry helper for building ModelEntry fixtures
- Tests for apply_piped_stdin (trim + prepend behavior, empty input)
- Tests for normalize_cli (no_session for print, lowercase provider)
- Tests for validate_rpc_args (@file rejection in RPC mode)
- Tests for parse_model_pattern (alias preference, dated fallback,
  thinking suffix parsing, invalid suffix warning)
- Tests for clamp_thinking_level (off for non-reasoning, xhigh
  clamping for unsupported models, passthrough for supported)

config.rs: use map_or_else for sessions_dir_from_env and
package_dir_from_env (clippy suggestion).

main.rs: print Packages directory and settings precedence in
`pi config` output.

lib.rs: make extension_popularity module public.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -449,18 +449,14 @@ fn sessions_dir_from_env<F>(get_env: F, global_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf
 where
     F: Fn(&str) -> Option<String>,
 {
-    get_env("PI_SESSIONS_DIR")
-        .map(PathBuf::from)
-        .unwrap_or_else(|| global_dir.join("sessions"))
+    get_env("PI_SESSIONS_DIR").map_or_else(|| global_dir.join("sessions"), PathBuf::from)
 }
 
 fn package_dir_from_env<F>(get_env: F, global_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf
 where
     F: Fn(&str) -> Option<String>,
 {
-    get_env("PI_PACKAGE_DIR")
-        .map(PathBuf::from)
-        .unwrap_or_else(|| global_dir.join("packages"))
+    get_env("PI_PACKAGE_DIR").map_or_else(|| global_dir.join("packages"), PathBuf::from)
 }
 
 fn parse_queue_mode(mode: Option<&str>) -> Option<QueueMode> {
